statusLegend.native-rust-replay-proven: Mounted by daemon-rs and exercised by contract_replay.rs.
statusLegend.native-rust-unit-only: Mounted by daemon-rs and covered by parity-rules.json, but not yet replayed end to end.
statusLegend.mounted-shallow: Mounted by daemon-rs without replay evidence or endpoint-specific parity rules.
statusLegend.missing: Public TypeScript daemon route is not mounted by daemon-rs.
statusLegend.deprecated-remove-from-ts-too: Route is intentionally unsupported and must be removed or hidden from both daemons.
